mapper.sql: id, class_id, teacher_id, schedule_date, course_detail_id, course_content, class_type, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_class_schedule (class_id, teacher_id, schedule_date, course_detail_id, course_content, class_type) values
(#{item.classId}, #{item.teacherId}, #{item.scheduleDate}, #{item.courseDetailId}, #{item.courseContent}, #{item.classType})
mapper.select: select from sys_class_schedule where class_id = #{classId} order by schedule_date asc, id asc

select from sys_class_schedule where class_id = #{classId} and course_detail_id in
#{item}
